title: <div>   * Escalation Rule (HRG-3): If the @Gemini-Arbiter identifies a task as &
content:
* Escalation Rule (HRG-3): If the @Gemini-Arbiter identifies a task as "stuck" (e.g., 3+ failed attempts) or "high-risk," it will pause that single task and flag it for "Human-in-the-Loop Review" without stopping the rest of the swarm.
Phase 6: Dynamic Ecosystem Generation [P6]
* Living Roadmap [P6-A]:
* Create a ROADMAP.md file and populate the Project board with future-state "Epics" and "Ideas" derived from the domain research.
* Ecosystem Scaffolding & Population [P6-B]:
* Generate the ecosystem (/docs, /examples, CI/CD workflows).
* Populate Content: Task the @DocWriterAgent to create draft content for the /docs site based on the [P4-A] knowledge graph.
* Populate Examples: Task the @RefactorAgent to create 1-2 practical examples in the /examples directory.
Phase 7: Finalization & H
